soft_lemma.statement: If t ∈ V(E) and G1(t;y)=2(y-a)^2(y-b) with a≠b, then a never lifts under F; at most b lifts (once, via forced x* off γ).
proof_sketch: R12 residual at y=a equals (1+a x)^2 (a-t2) up to units — independent of free z
if x=-1/a: b1=-t1; t1≠0 ⇒ no z
Phi_x forces unique x* on V(E)\γ so even if simple lifts, total fiber ≤1

claim_boundary: Structural upgrade of observational two-y soft conjecture. Replay probe_fiber_two_y_lemma.py for dense parametric grid. Not a ledger auto-close.
